description_long: This vending machine is a rectangular, upright unit with a predominantly dark blue and black exterior. The front face features a large, vertically oriented display panel with grayscale images of beverage cans, including a prominent Pepsi can in the center, suggesting it dispenses soft drinks. To the right of the display is a lighter vertical panel, likely for instructions or payment, and below the display is a horizontal slot, presumably for product retrieval. The sides and back are solid and dark, with minimal visible detail except for some faint blue graphics or text. The machine appears to be constructed from metal panels with a glossy finish, typical of commercial vending machines. Its robust build and branding make it suitable for placement in public urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or building lobbies.
description: A tall, rectangular vending machine with a dark blue and black exterior, featuring a large Pepsi-branded display and a product retrieval slot on the front.
description_view_0: The left side of the vending machine, mostly solid dark blue with faint graphics and no visible interactive features.
description_view_1: The front view shows the main display with beverage images, a vertical panel likely for payment or instructions, and a horizontal product retrieval slot at the bottom.
description_view_2: The right side, similar to the left, is dark blue with faint graphics and no visible interactive components.
description_view_3: The back of the machine is solid dark blue with minimal visible detail or features.
attribute_display_panel: A large, rectangular display panel is located on the upper front of the machine, showing grayscale images of beverage cans, including a central Pepsi can. The panel is vertically oriented and occupies most of the front face.
attribute_payment_interface: A vertical panel to the right of the display likely serves as the payment interface, but no specific payment slots or card readers are clearly visible.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, horizontal slot is located at the bottom center of the front face, likely for retrieving purchased products.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The front display prominently features a Pepsi can and the word 'pepsi' in large letters, serving as clear branding. The rest of the machine has faint blue graphics and text.
